blockers_encountered.description: Codex review BLOCK: fathom `cost` diverged from old `kwargs.get('response_cost', 0)` for explicit-None response_cost (old -> None -> dropped by None-filter; projection emitted cost:0). Keystone issue since pack 2b deletes the old builders and relies on the projections.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Applied fathom's .get(...,0) default AT SOURCE: request_event.py builder now `response_cost=kwargs.get('response_cost', 0)` (fathom-only event field; attribute_served_backend's separate `cost_fallback=kwargs.get('response_cost')` left UNCHANGED), and project_fathom now emits raw `cost: event.response_cost` so the trailing None-filter drops explicit-None. Reproduces absent->0(kept) / None->omitted / numeric->value.

blockers_encountered.resolution: Added `guardrail_collision` fixture (colliding airlock_provider/airlock_client into guardrail_meta); added `list(got.keys()) == list(expected.keys())` key-order assertion to the enterprise golden test; added `test_project_fathom_cost_cases` parametrized over absent/none/numeric. 44 passed.
